stemHtml: According to ICAO Annex 9 - inadmissible persons, if a state does not accept a person the operator must...

options.a: take the person back to the aircraft and commence the flight to the next planned destination.
options.b: take the person to his/her country of origin.
options.c: take the person to operator's country of origin.
options.d: take the person to any country that can accept him/her.
